productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Girls Pink Dress
description: Composition Fuchsia pink dress made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, short puff sleeves, print on the chest, drawstrings for the midriff, and a pleated skirt Fit Regular Wash care Use mild detergents Do not tumble dry Do not iron on emebellishments Use warm iron Remove all detatchable accessories before washing or ironing Gini and Jony have come up with this pretty frock, perfect for your little princess. Tiered for style and designed for comfort, watch her steal the show everywhere she goes!
